Always know they're safe.
Free to download.

A.1 — Hero Trust Strip
A — Hero

If something went wrong out there, Bond would already be on it.

Bond stages a live agent before every solo shift — watching your route, ready to act, one tap from stepping in. Your supervisor or safety contact can follow along. But the agent is already there before you begin.

  • A live agent staged and briefed before every shift — on your location and route
  • One tap to your agent if anything feels wrong — they're already watching
  • Auto-escalation if you stop responding or go off-route
  • Your trusted contact follows your live route throughout the shift

Trusted by lone workers across trades, security, utilities, and field services

C — Focused Service

Lone Worker Safety

Your agent is watching. Every shift. Every site.

Bond stages a trained security agent before every solo shift — briefed on your location, role, and route. They watch in real time from start to finish. If you stop responding, they act. Your trusted contact can follow along, but the agent is already there.

  • Agent staged and briefed before every shift begins
  • Works outdoors, in low-signal areas, and across large job sites
  • Auto-escalation if you go off-route or stop responding
  • Your trusted contact follows your live location throughout the shift
B — Feature Cards

Bond is more than just Lone Worker Safety.

Live tracking is just the start. Bond gives your trusted contact full shift visibility — every route, every check-in — and a live agent staged and ready when it matters.

Agent staged before you go out

Before your shift begins, Bond stages a trained security agent — briefed on your location, role, and route. They're watching before you even leave.

Automatic end-of-shift alert

Bond automatically notifies your trusted contact when your shift is complete and you've left site safely. No check-in phone call. No unanswered texts.

Your contact follows every shift

Bond shares your live route with a trusted colleague, supervisor, or safety officer from the moment you leave — every location, every stop, every stretch alone.

D — Safe Return

End-of-shift safe return

Your contact will know you finished safe. Before they start calling.

Bond monitors your shift from start to finish and automatically notifies your trusted contact when you leave site safely. If Bond doesn't detect your safe return, your staged agent steps in immediately.

  • Shift monitoring from start to safe return
  • Trusted contact notified automatically at end of shift
  • Auto-escalation if no safe return is detected
  • GPS and location photo sent to first responders if needed
E — Live Agent

Live security agents

Staged before you go out. Ready the moment you need them.

Bond's trained security agents are staged before your shift begins — briefed on your location, role, and route. One tap and they take charge. Coordinates emergency services, guides your trusted contact, and stays on until you're safe.

  • Agent staged and briefed before every solo shift
  • One tap — via video, audio, or text
  • Coordinates police, fire, and EMS on your behalf
  • Stays on with you until you're safe
F — Hook CTA

Most lone worker incidents happen
in the window between
the last check-in and the next.

Bond closes that window — live location, a staged agent, and an automatic safe-return alert. Set it up once. Run it every shift.

G — Social Proof

Trusted by lone workers across every industry

Loved by
workers
everywhere.

★★★★★ 4.8 out of 5
